events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.

events.name: cave_discovery
events.description: Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Luna Tide notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Clay Kai whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

## Year 86

### Events
- [GRN] **alien_signal**: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
- [RED] **colonist_conflict**: A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
- [GRN] **cave_discovery**: Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.

**Activity:** rest(3), farm(3), mediate(3), pray(2), hoard(2)
**Resources:** food:100%[OK] | water:100%[OK] | power:100%[OK] | air:100%[OK] | medicine:100%[OK]
**Cohesion:** 83%

### Sub-simulations (8)
- depth-1 aura-kai: 1.1
- depth-2 aura-kai: 1.2100000000000002
- depth-1 luna-tide: None

### Governance: consensus [PASSED]
Vote: 10 for / 7 against

*META: Luna Tide notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.*

*META: Clay Kai whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'*

diaries.text:
**Clay Mar-II** (air/mediator) — Year 86

The air in me stirs with possibility.

The signal... I do not know what to think.
Tempers flared. It is each other that will kill us.

*— Clay Mar-II, mediator*

**Storm Sto-III** (earth/artisan) — Year 86

The earth in me stirs with possibility.

The signal... I do not know what to think.
Tempers flared. It is each other that will kill us.

*— Storm Sto-III, artisan*

**Fen Marsh** (water/healer) — Year 86

Another year. We are still here.

The signal... I do not know what to think.
Tempers flared. It is each other that will kill us.

*— Fen Marsh, healer*
